name: acp_x402_promotion_plan
description: Suede Labs 14-day launch plan for an x402 paid endpoint or Bazaar listing. Returns a markdown plan covering endpoint readiness, day-by-day calendar, content pack (X posts, Telegram, LinkedIn), distribution targets (registries, directories, agent ecosystems), and day-7 / day-14 success metrics. Built for solo developers shipping new x402 endpoints or sellers re-launching a Bazaar offering with a real distribution motion.

endpoint_url.description: Public URL of the x402 endpoint or Bazaar listing being promoted.

what_it_does.description: Concise description of what the endpoint does, who it serves, and what the deliverable is.

price_usdc.description: Current price in USDC per call or per job.

current_traction.description: Optional: any existing usage, signups, or distribution surface in place.

constraints.description: Optional: time budget, channels off-limits, brand voice rules, etc.

examples.what_it_does: Long-audio transcription endpoint optimized for podcast and meeting agents.
examples.current_traction: Listed in 1 registry, no inbound traffic yet.
examples.constraints: Solo dev, can spend ~30 min/day on promo.
